title: Junior Instructional Designer at Pratham Education Capital India

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at Pratham Education Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Join the Pratham Education Capital India family as a Instructional Designer in Lucknow. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Pratham Education Capital India:
Pratham Education Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pratham Education Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
